div1.entryFree: Cheap, adv. sold c. what is most dear, Sonn. 110, 3. I hold your dainties c. Err. III, 1, 21. h. their manhoods c. H5 IV, 3, 66 (cf. Hold). buy land now as c. as . . ., H4A II, 4, 394. would have bought me lights as good c. at the dearest chandler's, III, 3, 51 (the word being originally a subst., == bargain).
